summary: Customer update on a barefoot horse named Tippy competing in ACTHA trail rides and NVRHA events while wearing Cavallo boots on rocky Arizona terrain.
Short testimonial from Lorna, a TREC rider for Team Great Britain in Scotland, praising the all-terrain performance of Cavallo Sport Hoof Boots on a trail ride.
Guest blog by Dutch Henry profiling Lonesome Dove Equestrian Center, a Texas program where veterans with PTSD find healing through horses.
Customer testimonial from Holly in Bend, Oregon about an 11-year-old gelding with soft soles regaining comfort on rocky trails using Cavallo hoof boots.
Customer testimonial from Lynn in Winfield, BC about a club-footed Arabian mare whose Cavallo Sport Hoof Boots stayed secure through mud, bog, and rocky terrain.
Announcement of a free Cavallo booklet answering common hoof boot questions on hoof mechanism, boots vs. metal shoes, measuring for fit, barefoot trimming, and gaited horses.
Customer testimonial from Jackie in Rushville, Ohio about using Cavallo hoof boots over an APHA show gelding's shod feet for turnout protection against sprung shoes.
Guest blog by Joe Camp on training horses with verbal vocabulary and treats, arguing horses can learn words and that treats accelerate communication.
Customer testimonial from Marianne Allen about a 20-year-old barefoot gelding named Stormy wearing red Cavallo Simple Boots for protection on debris-covered roads.
Cavallo Crusader profile of rider Erika Tanney and her horse Jazz in Kansas, covering their ACTHA achievements and bridleless riding partnership.
Guest blog by Dutch Henry on Freedom Horses, an equine-assisted therapy program founded by Betsi Bixby to help abused women heal through horses.
Informational article on how a horse's body and musculature change with age, season, and weight, affecting saddle fit, recommending Cavallo Total Comfort System memory-foam saddle pads.
